Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix: restore compliance.yml with SDK dep check
fix: CI compliance — check SDK dep instead of domain string

Add custom time control, service worker, move time stats

Custom time control:
- Two number inputs (1-180 min, 0-60 sec) in a "Custom" section
  below presets on the setup screen
- Typing auto-selects the custom control, presets deselect
- Inputs highlight with accent border when custom is active
- Persistence upgraded from label string to JSON {m, i} format
  with backwards-compatible restore from old format

Service worker (offline PWA):
- Network-first for navigation, cache-first for assets
- Pre-caches shell (/, index.html, manifest, icon) on install
- Falls back to cached index.html when offline
- Old caches cleaned on activate
- Registered on window load in main.tsx

Move time stats:
- Tracks per-player move times via ref (no extra re-renders)
- Last move time shown in info line: "3 mv · 8.2s"
- Formatted as Xs (< 10s with decimal), Xs (< 60s), XmYs (longer)
- Resets on game reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

docs(CLAUDE): adopt slim per-repo shape

Refactors this CLAUDE.md to the slim convention documented in
SKILLS.md. Platform-wide knowledge (tech stack, brand, deploy,
mobile rules, paths) lives in SKILLS.md as the single source of
truth -- duplicating it per repo just creates drift surface area
that breaks AI agents over time. This file now only carries
what is unique to this repo.

Initial scaffold: Todo app for FreeAppStore

feat: add PWA manifest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add number formats and conditional formatting

Number formats (toolbar dropdown):
- Auto (default behavior)
- Currency: $1,234.56
- Percent: 12.34% (multiplies by 100)
- Decimal: 1234.56 (forces 2 decimals)

Per-cell, persists with other formats.

Conditional formatting:
- Rules button in toolbar (highlights when rules exist)
- Dialog to add/remove rules per sheet
- Rule types: greater than, less than, equals, contains, between (1..10)
- Custom bg color, text color, and bold for matching cells
- Last matching rule wins
- Conditional format overrides cell format but loses to selection/find highlights

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Close gaps: string literals, cross-sheet refs, header context menus

Formula engine:
- String literals in formulas: =SUBSTITUTE(A1,"old","new") works
- splitArgs respects quoted commas: LEN("a,b,c") = 5
- Escaped quotes: "a""b" → a"b
- Cross-sheet refs: =Sheet2!A1, =SUM(Sheet2!A1:A10)
- Case-insensitive sheet names (Excel convention)
- Circular detection across sheets

Headers:
- Right-click column header → context menu (insert/delete/sort)
- Right-click row header → context menu (insert/delete/freeze)
- Left-click column/row header → selects entire column/row

10 new tests added (109 total, all passing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add packageManager field to fix CI deploy

pnpm/action-setup@v4 requires packageManager in package.json to know
which pnpm version to install. Without it, the deploy workflow fails
at the pnpm setup step.
